title: Out of Africa
description: An exploratory timeline+map of the early human journey out of Africa: Homo sapiens dispersal across the continents, from ~315,000 years ago to the peopling of the last Pacific islands. Auto-plays through deep time and pauses on demand. Every milestone — find sites, branch points, climate events, admixture events — links to primary scientific papers, Wikipedia, and educational videos. Multi-day project: this commit covers the design, plan, and research phase.
license_notes: Design and research phase only — no runtime dependencies yet. License notes will be filled in once the implementation stack is chosen.
